title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arihant Publications South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arihant Publications South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Arihant Publications South Asia Partners family as a Curriculum Developer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Arihant Publications South Asia Partners:
Arihant Publications South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications South Asia Partners!
